betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Engine Lubricant§f

§aA specialized fluid for keeping your machines running smoothly — essential for advanced machinery!§f

Engine Lubricant is a viscous fluid produced from §bHeavy Oil§f or §bIndustrial Oil§f. It provides lubrication for high-performance machines and is required for various advanced crafting recipes.

§6Production§f:
§b• Fractioning Tower§f: §e100mB§f Industrial Oil → §e60mB§f Heating Oil + §e40mB§f Engine Lubricant.
§b• Chemical Plant§f: §e2,000mB§f Heavy Oil → §e1,000mB§f Engine Lubricant (requires §bBlueprint: Lubricant from Heavy Oil§f).

§6Uses§f:
§b• Machinery§f: Required as a crafting component for various advanced HBM machines.
§b• Petroil§f: Combine with Reclaimed Industrial Oil in later production chains.

§eTip§f: The §bChemical Plant§f route using Heavy Oil gives a generous §e50%§f conversion rate (§e2,000mB§f → §e1,000mB§f). The §bFractioning Tower§f route produces lubricant as a co-product, best used when you are already fractioning Industrial Oil for Heating Oil.
